name: 天照
description: 选择一个格子为中心，以3×3范围永久标记为天照范围。任何棋子经过天照格子时附加一层天照效果，每回合结束时站在天照上的棋子再附加一层；每层天照使该棋子每回合结束时失去2点生命值（无伤害来源）
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var battle = context.battle; var center = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 99, filter: 'all' }); if (!center || center.needsTargetSelection) return center; if (!battle.extensions) battle.extensions = {}; if (!battle.extensions.tileEffects) battle.extensions.tileEffects = []; if (!battle.extensions.amaterasuCells) battle.extensions.amaterasuCells = []; var added = 0; for (var dx = -1; dx <= 1; dx++) { for (var dy = -1; dy <= 1; dy++) { var cx = center.x + dx; var cy = center.y + dy; var tile = battle.map && battle.map.tiles && battle.map.tiles.find(function(t) { return t.x === cx && t.y === cy; }); if (!tile) continue; if (!battle.extensions.tileEffects.some(function(t) { return t.tileType === 'amaterasu' && t.x === cx && t.y === cy; })) { battle.extensions.tileEffects.push({ x: cx, y: cy, sourceId: 'amaterasu', tileType: 'amaterasu', icon: '🔥', bgColor: 'linear-gradient(to top, rgba(140, 15, 0, 0.88), rgba(10, 0, 0, 0.65))', boxShadow: 'inset 0 0 6px rgba(255, 60, 0, 0.5)', iconPosition: 'bottom-right' }); added++; } if (!battle.extensions.amaterasuCells.some(function(c) { return c.x === cx && c.y === cy; })) { battle.extensions.amaterasuCells.push({ x: cx, y: cy }); } } } battle.extensions.amaterasuOwnerPlayerId = caster.ownerPlayerId; addPlayerRuleById(caster.ownerPlayerId, 'rule-sasuke-amaterasu-move'); addPlayerRuleById(caster.ownerPlayerId, 'rule-sasuke-amaterasu-endturn'); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '释放天照，以(' + center.x + ',' + center.y + ')为中心标记了' + added + '个格子为永久天照范围！凡踏入者将遭受黑炎灼烧' }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '选择中心格，将3×3区域永久标记为天照范围，经过或停留的棋子每层天照每回合失去2点生命', expectedValues: {} }; }
